name: Resplendent Chapters
descriptionTemplate: Restore [Heal:Arg1] HP, obtain [Power:Arg2] {STR}. other Awakeners gain [Energy:Arg3] Aliemus. All Awakeners Temporary Crit. Rate and Crit. DMG +[Arg4]%. If Horla is currently under an {Emotion} state, improve the effect provided by {Resplendent Chapters} corresponding to the {Emotion} state by 150%.

patch.descriptionTemplate: Restore [Heal:Arg1] HP, obtain [Power:Arg2] {STR}. other Awakeners gain [Energy:Arg3] Aliemus, Temporary Crit. Rate and Crit. DMG +[Arg4]%. Under different emotions, {Resplendent Chapters}' corresponding effects are enhanced by 250%.
